problem id: 04c44df4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(6)

examples:
  11000011 -> 00000011
  11100101 -> 00000011
  01010010 -> 00000001
  10100111 -> 00000010
  10010000 -> 00000010
  10011110 -> 00000010
  00110101 -> 00000000
  11100001 -> 00000011
  01010100 -> 00000001
  01000101 -> 00000001

query: 00011110
predicted answer: 00000000
